reference: I am thirty-two weeks pregnant with a bad cough. I first felt pain in my stomach at the beginning, but now the pain has escalated into the middle part of my left backside. Is this pain the result of coughing too much, or is there something wrong with my kidney?
text: i am 32 weeks pregnant with a bad cough i first felt pain in my stomach at the beginning but now the pain has escalated into the middle part of my left backside is this pain the result of coughing too much or is there something wrong with my kidney
